summary: Mechanical gates all green: pnpm lint clean, 43/43 Vitest tests pass, cargo check 0 errors, vite build clean. TC-1.1 token-hex diff has zero mismatches on :root tokens; the 7 peer-palette hexes and #AEB8C0 muted-unread live in lib/peer.ts (expected — they are a hash function, not a token). TC-1.3 all 6 keyframe durations match README verbatim (msg-pop 260 / toast-in 280 / fade-in 200 / pulse-ring 1.8s / shimmer 1.4s / spin 0.9s). OUT-7 real-hardware bidirectional E2E DEFERRED (no SSH access to 192.168.50.48); substituted by existing Zustand store tests against mocked Tauri events. Visual VC-1..VC-15 DEFERRED (Tauri dev compile cycle unavailable in this non-interactive session); designer runbook provided for human follow-up.
